mapper.select: SELECT config_key, config_value, description, encrypted, updated_at FROM SYSTEM_CONFIG ORDER BY config_key
SELECT config_key, config_value, description, encrypted, updated_at FROM SYSTEM_CONFIG WHERE config_key LIKE #{prefix} || '%' ORDER BY config_key
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SYSTEM_CONFIG (config_key, config_value, description, encrypted, updated_at) VALUES (#{configKey}, #{configValue}, #{description}, #{encrypted}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ON CONFLICT (config_key) DO UPDATE SET config_value = #{configValue}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
